title: athyrium crassicaule
intro: Athyrium crassicaule, also known as Japanese lady fern or thick-stemmed lady fern, is a species of fern in the family Woodsiaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Athyrium crassicaule include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and stems can be dried and used in herbal remedies.
